summary: Swedish Nobel laureate. Author of Barabbas and The Dwarf. Barabbas begins with Jesus's crucifixion and ends with the title character's own crucifixion.

works.name: Barabbas
works.description: Novel beginning with the crucifixion of Jesus and ending with the crucifixion of the title character.

examples: begins with the crucifixion of Jesus and ends with the crucifixion of the title character, Barabbas

clues.clue: Describes the title character's life during the Renaissance
examples: described the title character's life during the Renaissance in The Dwarf

comprehensive_summary: Pär Lagerkvist (1891-1974) was a Swedish Nobel Prize-winning author. His novel Barabbas begins with the crucifixion of Jesus and ends with the crucifixion of the title character. The Dwarf depicts its title character's life during the Renaissance.

cards.front: Novel: begins with the crucifixion of Jesus and ends with the crucifixion of the title character
